race.comment: SIDE PIECE (2) placed two starts ago at Mt Gambier but could only manage fifth last time, beaten 3.5 lengths, over 1620m on turf at Donald. Look for improvement first go synthetic. GRUNNETTAN (4) finished 5 lengths back in ninth over 2050m at Wodonga at the latest appearance just six days ago. Turns around quickly and the run two back here reads very well. VIVID BLOOMS (13) disappointed last start when 11th over 2000m at Mildura after a win at Kyneton prior to that. Can bounce back. TOSEN GLORY (6) finished sixth last start over 2000m at Warrnambool. Can contest for a place. BRAVE EIGHT (3) might be ready to show something fourth up.
